title: hep-ph-demo universal core summary (model-agnostic)
description: Model-agnostic keys that apply to any DM relic-density skill. Per-skill extensions use allOf composition. This file MUST NOT contain channel names, model names, or parameter-point values.

schema_version.description: Schema version; const 1 for this release.

model.description: BSM model name; free string — per-skill schemas MAY add const constraint.

run_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the run completed.

ran.description: Constraint names that actually executed this run. Per-skill schemas MAY restrict via enum.

skipped_constraints.description: Constraints skipped this run and why.

artifacts_dir.description: Relative path to the directory where run artifacts are stored.

headline.description: Human-readable one-line summary of the run outcome.

relic_approx.description: True if relic density was approximated (analytic/EFT); false if from full Boltzmann integration.

model_source.description: Provenance of the UFO model (e.g. hand_crafted_sarah_model, sarah_build_renderer, feynrules_export).

model_fixture.description: Path to the committed model fixture directory, or empty string if not fixture-based.

channel_percentages.description: Raw percent-valued annihilation channel contributions from MadDM (sum ~ 100). Channel names are free strings — they are parameter-point properties, not model properties.

channel_fractions.description: Normalized unit-fraction annihilation channel contributions (sum in [0.99, 1.01]). Channel names are free strings.

benchmark_id.description: References the named benchmark fixture under <skill>/benchmarks/<benchmark_id>/expectations.json.

provenance_ref.description: Path to the sibling provenance.json file. Runtime invariant: provenance.json must be written before summary.json.
